positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed symmetrical illustration depicting cosmic flora: stylized bioluminescent jungle leaves intertwining with nebula clouds and miniature moons. The composition should feature deep indigo blues, vibrant turquoise, and striking metallic gold accents. The style is a blend of celestial etching and ornate botanical art, utilizing high contrast black outlines against a deep space background. The overall aesthetic must be clean, highly graphic, and suitable for seamless textile printing, ensuring strong silhouettes and excellent visibility when scaled.
